Sort the players who participated in the 2002 Masters snooker competition by their year of birth from oldest to youngest, and then alphabetically by last name for those with the same year of birth. What is the year of birth of the sixth player in this sorted list
sparql:
SELECT ?player ?birthYear ?familyName WHERE {
  ?player wdt:P1344 wd:Q2070302 ; wdt:P31 wd:Q5 ; wdt:P569 ?birthDate ; wdt:P734 ?familyName .
  BIND(YEAR(?birthDate) AS ?birthYear)
}
ORDER BY ASC(?birthYear) ASC(?familyName)
OFFSET 5
LIMIT 1

question: Sort the Boston Red Sox championship series wins by the total attendance of all games played in the series, from highest to lowest. What was the total attendance for the series ranked second in this sorted list
result:
| seriesLabel                                 | totalAttendance   |
| ------------------------------------------- | ----------------- |
| 1915 Major League Baseball season (lang:en) | 3575289 (xsd:int) |
sparql:
SELECT ?seriesLabel(SUM(xsd:integer(?num)) AS ?totalAttendance) WHERE {
  ?series wdt:P1346 wd:Q213959 .
  ?game wdt:P361 ?series .
  ?game p:P1110 / psv:P1110 ?attValue .
  ?attValue wikibase:quantityAmount ?num .
  ?series rdfs:label ?seriesLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?seriesLabel) = 'en')
}
GROUP BY ?seriesLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?totalAttendance)
LIMIT 1
OFFSET 1

Sort Lewis Hamilton's Formula One championship seasons from 2015 onwards by the number of races from highest to lowest. What is the number of races in the second season in this sorted list
result_cleaned: 2018 Formula One World Championship|21.0|2018|2019 Formula One World Championship|2019|2017 Formula One World Championship|20.0|2017|2015 Formula One World Championship|19.0|2015
result:
| season                                             | races              | year           |
| -------------------------------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------- |
| 2018 Formula One World Championship (wd:Q23051084) | 21.0 (xsd:decimal) | 2018 (xsd:int) |
| 2019 Formula One World Championship (wd:Q41173535) | 21.0 (xsd:decimal) | 2019 (xsd:int) |
| 2017 Formula One World Championship (wd:Q20755615) | 20.0 (xsd:decimal) | 2017 (xsd:int) |
| 2015 Formula One World Championship (wd:Q14293115) | 19.0 (xsd:decimal) | 2015 (xsd:int) |
sparql:
SELECT ?season ?races ?year WHERE {
  wd:Q9673 wdt:P2522 ?season .
  ?season wdt:P1350 ?races .
  ?season rdfs:label ?label .
  FILTER(lang(?label) = 'en')
  FILTER(REGEX(?label , '^[0-9]{4} Formula One' , 'i'))
  BIND(xsd:integer(SUBSTR(STR(?label) , 1 , 4)) AS ?year)
  FILTER(?year >= 2015)
}
ORDER BY DESC(?races)
LIMIT 10

question: Sort the total number of senior VFL/AFL Grand Final appearances for Collingwood and Richmond from highest to lowest. What is the second number in the sorted list

| ----------------------------------- | ------------ |
| Collingwood Football Club (lang:en) | 42 (xsd:int) |

sparql:
SELECT ?clubLabel(COUNT(?event) AS ?count) WHERE {
  VALUES ?club {
    wd:Q249679 wd:Q2521385
  }
  ?club rdfs:label ?clubLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?clubLabel) = "en")
  .
  ?club wdt:P1344 ?event .
  ?event rdfs:label ?eventLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?eventLabel) = "en")
  .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?eventLabel) , "grand final"))
  .
}
GROUP BY ?clubLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
